copied_from.reason: Single-variable replay of run-029. NOT re-snapshotted from the live tree (which has drifted — RBT-70 merged into it). The one intended variable is the RBT-70 change: the four gen-11 reviewer prompts + real_hats.py array-salvage seam. The code exercised by run-030 is at HEAD 0370254 (PR #37), recorded independently in the top-level manifest.json head_sha; sofia_head_sha above is the HEAD at which these bytes' provenance was pinned (run-029 prep, 6ea865c).
copied_from.target_provenance: The reviewed target (sha 24461d3f) is the PRISTINE PRE-RUN document, sourced from the untouched sandbox canonical source (agent-loop/sandbox/adr-008/...), byte-identical to run-029's recorded pre-run pin (24461d3f) — the bytes run-029 actually reviewed at pass 1. run-029's committed documents/ copy (sha 19897547) is deliberately NOT used: it is the post-run author-mutated end-state (the dry-mode author writes edits into documents/ across passes, run-supervision §9), not the frozen target. Same for run-028 (committed 7be888af vs pin 24461d3f).
copied_from.substrate_provenance: Substrate (14 files) copied verbatim from run-029's committed substrate/ and hash-verified byte-identical to run-029; substrate is never author-mutated (run-prep §3), and each file re-hashes to its own substrate/manifest.json pin (gate 4).

files.note: Byte-identical to run-028's pre-run target (sha 24461d3f), snapshotted fresh from the pristine sandbox canonical source for the RBT-69 before/after replay. Substrate copied verbatim from run-028's frozen snapshot so the RBT-69 code change is the only variable.
